headline: JPMorgan is nearing $1 trillion for a reason investors missed
summary: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) just posted the biggest-ever quarterly profit by a U.S. bank. But that record alone is not the reason retail investors should care. The $21.2 billion profit involved gains that won’t recur each quarter. Visa-related transactions added $4.6 billion, while some equity investments ...

summary: Jamie Dimon said the next chapter of his career after serving as CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co could include writing books, teaching, and public policy, but ruled out any possibility of a future in politics. In an interview with...

headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Puts $24 Million Into Philadelphia Shipbuilding And Defense
summary: JPMorgan Chase is committing $24 million to support Philadelphia's maritime and defense manufacturing sector. The funding is part of the bank's broader Security and Resiliency Initiative in U.S. shipbuilding. The program combines direct investments, loans, and philanthropic grants to support workforce training, supply chains, and small business suppliers. For investors watching NYSE:JPM, this move highlights how a major U.S. bank is tying its capital to critical industrial and defense...

headline: How Jalen Brunson and Kristin Lemkau are Educating the Next Generation of Athletes
summary: Jalen Brunson and J.P. Morgan Wealth Management CEO Kristin Lemkau discuss the newly-formed Athlete Council, JPMorganChase's financial advisory group launched to help athletes navigate their money from college through retirement. They also detail Brunson's personal financial strategies and how sports is now viewed as a highly profitable asset class.
